dates.summary: ByteDance Seed launched Seed Full-Duplex Speech LLM, a voice model positioned around full-duplex interaction, interference suppression, and more natural conversational turn-taking. Separately, reports said China blocked Meta’s $2B Manus acquisition, a notable geopolitical constraint on cross-border AI dealmaking, while the Microsoft-OpenAI partnership drew heavy attention but lacked a clean, source-grounded artifact in the supplied evidence.
